title: Skyrim Harvest and Hearth
description: Brings Skyrim's food and flora into Minecraft!
body:
# 🍞 Skyrim Harvest and Hearth

**Bring the flavors and flora of Tamriel to your Minecraft world!**

Experience the rich culinary traditions of Skyrim with this comprehensive food mod that adds over 60 authentic foods, drinks, and cooking mechanics directly inspired by The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim.


## ✨ Features

### 🥘 **Authentic Skyrim Foods**
- **Sweet Rolls** - The iconic pastry that guards are always asking about
- **Garlic Bread** - Provides disease resistance, just like in Skyrim
- **Mammoth Steak** - Hearty meat from the frozen tundra
- **Nordic Cheeses** - Sliced Goat Cheese and Eidar Cheese
- **Regional Vegetables** - Ash Yams, Leeks, Cabbage, and Tomatoes
- **Exotic Fruits** - Jazbay Grapes, Juniper Berries, and Snowberries

### 🍺 **Skyrim Beverages**
- **Nord Mead** - The drink of choice for true Nords
- **Black-Briar Mead** - Premium mead from Riften's finest brewery
- **Alto Wine** - Sophisticated wine for refined tastes
- **Argonian Ale** - Exotic brew from the marshlands
- **Skooma** - The infamous Khajiit beverage (use responsibly!)

### 🔥 **Advanced Cooking System**
- **Oven Recipes** - Bake bread, pastries, and roasts in custom ovens
- **Special Effects** - Many foods provide beneficial effects:
  - Sweet Rolls grant Absorption
  - Garlic Bread cures diseases
  - Raw meats may cause hunger (just like eating questionable food!)

### 🌱 **Farmable Crops**
- **Garlic** - Essential cooking ingredient
- **Tomatoes** - Fresh vegetables for soups and stews
- **Cabbage** - Hardy northern vegetable
- **Ash Yams** - Exotic Morrowind import
- **Berry Bushes** - Harvestable Jazbay, Juniper, and Snowberry bushes

### 🏺 **Cooking Ingredients**
- **Flour** - Ground from wheat for baking
- **Butter** - Rich dairy for cooking
- **Salt Pile** - Essential seasoning for most recipes
- **Specialty Items** - Pearls, eggs, and other rare ingredients

### 📦 **Loot Tables**
- Find all your common ingredients, seeds and more in various loot tables around the world!


## 🍳 Recipe Examples

**Sweet Roll** (Oven)
- Butter + Egg + Salt Pile + Flour + Milk Bucket

**Garlic Bread** (Oven) 
- Butter + Garlic + Flour

**Apple Pie** (Oven)
- Flour + Salt Pile + Butter + Egg + Apple

**Beef Stew** (Cooking Pot)
- Beef + Vegetables + Salt Pile


## 🎮 Gameplay Integration

- **Balanced Nutrition** - All foods provide realistic hunger restoration
- **Survival Friendly** - Perfect for hardcore survival gameplay
- **Quest Rewards** - Use foods as rewards or trade goods
- **Roleplay Enhancement** - Run taverns, become a chef, or trade in exotic foods


## 📋 Requirements

- Forge Config API Port
- Common Network


## 🔧 Compatibility

This mod is designed to be compatible with:
- Most cooking and food mods
- Survival mods (Tough as Nails, etc.)
- Farming mods (Pam's HarvestCraft, etc.)
- Village and structure mods


## 🎯 Future Plans

- Additional Skyrim foods and recipes
- Integration with brewing mechanics
- Custom food effects and buffs
- Compatibility patches for popular mods
- Texture improvements and animations


## 💝 Support the Developer

If you enjoy this mod, please consider:
- ⭐ Leaving a positive review
- 💬 Sharing screenshots of your creations
- 🔄 Recommending to friends
- ☕ [Buy me a coffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/ryankshah)

---

*"I used to be an adventurer like you, then I took an arrow to the knee... but at least I can still enjoy a good Sweet Roll!"*
